meta.title: Minn Admin
meta.author: Austin Ginder
meta.description: Launch Minn Admin from GitHub in WordPress Playground.

options.blogdescription: A disposable WordPress demo for Minn Admin.

steps.command: wp post create --post_type=page --post_title='About Minn Admin' --post_status=publish --post_content='A reimagined WordPress admin experience.' --user=admin
wp post create --post_title='Meet the new dashboard' --post_status=publish --post_content='Fast, focused and beautiful.' --user=admin
wp post create --post_title='One vanilla-JS file' --post_status=publish --post_content='No React, no build step.' --user=admin
wp post create --post_title='Draft release notes' --post_status=draft --post_content='Coming soon.' --user=admin
wp user create dana dana@example.com --role=editor --display_name='Dana Lee' --user_pass=demo-pass-1 --user=admin
wp user create sam sam@example.com --role=author --display_name='Sam Rivera' --user_pass=demo-pass-2 --user=admin
wp comment create --comment_post_ID=1 --comment_author='Dana Lee' --comment_content='Love the new dashboard!' --comment_approved=0 --user=admin
wp option update blogdescription 'Fast, focused and beautiful WordPress admin.' --user=admin
